name: litestar-skills
description: Opinionated first-party agent skills for the Litestar framework ecosystem

interface.shortDescription: First-party Litestar framework skills: handlers, DTOs, DI, plugins, MCP, SAQ, Granian, SQLSpec, Advanced Alchemy
defaultPrompt: Expose this SQLAlchemy model as a Litestar Controller with full CRUD routes
Make my Litestar routes available as MCP tools via litestar-mcp
Wire up a Vite frontend (React / Vue / Svelte / HTMX / Inertia) with litestar-vite
Serve an AI model from Litestar — streaming responses, batching, background workers via SAQ
Implement JWT auth with refresh tokens, rotation, and secure cookie storage
Scaffold a new Litestar app with opinionated defaults (Granian + msgspec + advanced-alchemy + sqlspec)
